glossary.definition: JSON Web Token. A signed string that proves who a user is without hitting the database on every request. Generated on login, sent in the Authorization header for subsequent requests.
A function that runs on every request before it reaches the route handler. Used here for authentication checks and request logging.
Object-Relational Mapper. Prisma lets you write TypeScript code that automatically translates to SQL queries, so you don't write raw SQL.

env_vars.name: JWT_SECRET
env_vars.description: Secret key for signing JWT tokens. Use a long random string in production.

first_tasks: Try POST /api/auth/signup with an email and password to create a user
Run pnpm test to verify the test suite passes
